studies.title: Effects of an app based individual physiotherapy program for anterior knee pain - a prospective multicenter randomized control trial

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the digital health application 'companion patella' for the treatment of anterior knee pain, as mentioned in the trial description and intervention details.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a prospective, multicenter, randomized, controlled trial, which indicates that participants are randomly allocated to an intervention group and a control group under controlled trial conditions.
